Subject: Light Conversion to 12v
Notes: *CHANGE ORDER* - Additional Labor Due to Unforeseen Repair Complications We have been experiencing ongoing issues with bulbs constantly burning out. Per California regulations, LED lights are required for use in pools. Older systems not compatible with LED lights may result in repeated failures. It is highly recommended to convert to a 12V system to ensure compliance and reduce maintenance issues.

Subject: Rola Chem Interlocking
Notes: Per Sacramento EMD regulations, all chemical feeders must be interlocked with the recirculation pump. This safety measure ensures that chemical dosing automatically stops when the circulation pump is turned off or fails, preventing the buildup of concentrated chemicals in the system, which could lead to unsafe conditions for bathers or damage to equipment.
